---
pagetitle: "AI & Data Science Consultant, Educator & Speaker"
description: "Dr. Chester Ismay helps individuals and teams use AI and data science with confidence through consulting, education, speaking, and open-source tools."
image: images/social-card.png
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

::: {.home-hero}

::: {.home-intro}

![](images/pro_photo_2026-06.jpeg){.home-photo fig-alt="Portrait of Dr. Chester Ismay"}

<h1 class="home-name">Dr. Chester Ismay</h1>

::: {.home-tagline}
AI &middot; Data Science &middot; Education &middot; Consulting
:::

I help individuals and teams **use AI and data science with confidence**, not just for the hype, but to actually get projects completed effectively and efficiently.

I work at the intersection of **AI, statistics, and communication** by designing hands-on, engaging learning experiences that make complex ideas approachable. I support teams building responsible, reproducible, and effective data workflows. I build tools that are thoroughly tested with the user in mind at all times.

Whether it's a university rolling out an AI curriculum, a nonprofit streamlining its data analysis, or a company making sense of noisy dashboards, I bring a human-first mindset to the table. I enjoy helping people learn something new, debug a problem, or bring a fuzzy idea into reality. Outside of work, you'll probably find me hiking, rowing, or exploring a new dataset for fun. I collaborate best with teams who value clarity, curiosity, and thoughtful problem-solving.

[Get in touch](mailto:chester.ismay@gmail.com){.btn-cta}

:::

::: {.home-roles}

<a class="role-card" href="consulting.html">
<span class="role-title">Consultant</span>
<span class="role-desc">I partner with universities, nonprofits, agencies, and companies to design data workflows powered by AI, automation, and reproducible practices — helping teams cut through complexity and focus on what works.</span>
<span class="role-more">Learn more &rarr;</span>
</a>

<a class="role-card" href="workshops.html">
<span class="role-title">Educator</span>
<span class="role-desc">I create and teach hands-on learning experiences in R, Python, SQL, and AI — from short workshops to full-semester courses — empowering learners at all levels to use data with confidence.</span>
<span class="role-more">Learn more &rarr;</span>
</a>

<a class="role-card" href="talks.html">
<span class="role-title">Speaker</span>
<span class="role-desc">I give energetic, example-driven talks on the future of data science education and the practical use of AI — bridging the gap between what's possible and what's useful.</span>
<span class="role-more">Learn more &rarr;</span>
</a>

<a class="role-card" href="portfolio.html">
<span class="role-title">Author</span>
<span class="role-desc">I'm co-author of ModernDive and other open educational tools that make statistics and data science more accessible, modern, and fun — always with the learner in mind.</span>
<span class="role-more">Learn more &rarr;</span>
</a>

:::

:::
